description:
You are maintaining a 4-pole motor operating at 60 Hz. Calculate the slip percentage using the Electrical Engineering Calculations app based on a synchronous speed of 1800 RPM and a measured rotor speed of 1725 RPM. Create a result file at /sdcard/tasks/motor_slip_result.txt with the following content:

Synchronous_RPM: 1800
Measured_RPM: 1725
Slip_Percentage: [numeric result]
